fix_diff:
diff --git a/devfleet.db b/devfleet.db
+update tool_statuses
+set current_task=NULL, status='idle'
+where device_id='48acf8c9-3549-442d-8838-0849ee2dc50d' and tool_name='codex';
root_cause: Manual/stale task failure updated sub_tasks/tasks but did not clear tool_statuses.current_task for codex.
symptom: Device shows codex idle but currentTask still points to failed stale task, blocking new dispatch visibility
